creator: basarevych@gmail.com
text:
the port could not fetch its distfiles:

# cd /usr/ports/net/remmina
# make install clean
===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for remmina-1.0.0
=> remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /share/freebsd/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch https://nodeload.github.com/FreeRDP/remmina/legacy.tar.gz/1.0.0?dummy=/remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz
fetch: https://nodeload.github.com/FreeRDP/remmina/legacy.tar.gz/1.0.0?dummy=/remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz: Bad Request
=> Attempting to fetch http://nodeload.github.com/FreeRDP/remmina/legacy.tar.gz/1.0.0?dummy=/remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz
fetch: http://nodeload.github.com/FreeRDP/remmina/legacy.tar.gz/1.0.0?dummy=/remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz: Bad Request
=> Attempting to fetch http://cloud.github.com/downloads/FreeRDP/remmina/remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz
fetch: http://cloud.github.com/downloads/FreeRDP/remmina/remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz: Forbidden
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/remmina-1.0.0.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /share/freebsd/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1

Stop in /share/freebsd/ports/net/remmina.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /share/freebsd/ports/net/remmina.
